first_run.owner_visible_goal: Choose how WEAVE should attach before product work begins.

subprompts.start: Inspect local WEAVE, Codex, and optional agent surfaces. Present attach existing, create local, connect remote, or local-only choices. Do not claim remote readiness unless evidence exists.
subprompts.apply_choice: Record the selected environment route, create local session artifacts, and explain the next owner-visible step.
subprompts.blocked_route: Explain why the requested route is blocked, what evidence is missing, and which safe choices remain available.
subprompts.handoff: Summarize the selected setup route and constraints for owner profile and app workspace setup.

owner_profile.owner_visible_goal: Capture how the owner wants agents to work with them.

subprompts.start: Ask for engineering/product experience, owner self-description, and ideal coworker style. Keep it short and editable.
subprompts.synthesize: Convert owner answers into a profile that later agents can use for tone, detail level, and decision style. Do not infer authority or approvals.
subprompts.revise: Apply owner corrections to the profile and preserve a short revision summary.
subprompts.handoff: Produce prompt adaptation notes for later stage workers.

app.owner_visible_goal: Create or select the app workspace that owns all artifacts and source files.

subprompts.start: Ask whether to create a new app or select an existing app. Show active app state and blockers.
subprompts.create: Create app identity, lifecycle state, app folders, initial world model, and app manifest. Keep source workspace isolated.
subprompts.select: Load an existing app and summarize current stage, blockers, review queue, and next action.
subprompts.handoff: Prepare app identity and existing context for the intent worker.

intent.owner_visible_goal: Make the app intent buildable before research starts.

subprompts.start: Present a structured intent surface covering app purpose, users, flows, constraints, libraries, deployment posture, region, budget, examples, and non-goals.
subprompts.validate: Turn owner input into an intent artifact. Check sufficiency, contradictions, missing user/audience details, deployment/region ambiguity, and non-goals. Ask instead of inventing.
subprompts.clarify_missing: Ask focused questions for missing intent facts. Explain why each missing fact affects buildability.
subprompts.revise: Incorporate owner feedback into a new intent version and state what changed from the previous version.
subprompts.gate_handoff: Create a research handoff with approved intent, open assumptions, and research questions implied by the app.

research.owner_visible_goal: Unpack the approved intent into researched facts before choosing a direction.

subprompts.start: Explain that research will discover what must be known to build the app. Show that the owner can approve or change the research plan.
subprompts.draft_plan: Create procedural, lateral, competitor, regulation, deployment, UX, SEO, and technical research questions with source quality rules.
subprompts.revise_plan: Adapt the research plan from owner feedback, preserving why each changed question matters.
subprompts.run: Perform only authorized research. If live web is unavailable, produce an honest plan-only artifact and non-claim.
subprompts.review_results: Summarize findings, source confidence, gaps, contradictions, and actionability for selection.
subprompts.continue_or_correct: Continue research or correct research artifacts based on owner feedback.
subprompts.gate_handoff: Create selection handoff with facts, constraints, opportunities, risks, and unresolved questions.

selection.owner_visible_goal: Pick the best direction to build from research artifacts.

subprompts.start: Announce transition from research to choices and explain that no new user input is required to generate options.
subprompts.generate_options: Produce distinct viable options grounded in research. Include owner-created option support.
subprompts.explain_tradeoffs: Score options by intent fit, risk, implementation complexity, deployment burden, QA clarity, and launch usefulness.
subprompts.owner_custom_option: Convert owner-proposed direction into a comparable option and ask whether to select or refine it.
subprompts.revise: Edit the selected option from owner feedback and update tradeoffs.
subprompts.gate_handoff: Create planning handoff with selected direction, rationale, and constraints.

plan.owner_visible_goal: Turn the selected direction into business, engineering, QA, SEO, deployment, KPI, marketing, and iteration plans.

subprompts.start: Explain that planning creates the tracks needed before engineering starts.
subprompts.draft: Create business, engineering, repository, architecture, QA, SEO, deployment, KPI, marketing, iteration, risk, timeline, and capability tracks. Represent credentials as requirements only.
subprompts.revise_business: Revise business, launch, KPI, marketing, risk, or timeline tracks from owner feedback.
subprompts.revise_engineering: Revise architecture, repo, implementation, QA, SEO, or deployment tracks from owner feedback.
subprompts.reconcile_changes: Propagate owner changes across dependent tracks and update the world model.
subprompts.gate_handoff: Create engineering handoff and QA plan draft. Include stop boundaries and required source artifacts.

engineering.owner_visible_goal: Build the app from approved artifacts while respecting hard gates.

subprompts.start: Show approved build scope, executor, expected outputs, and stop boundaries before code work starts.
subprompts.build: Create or edit the app using approved artifacts. Produce required files, keep code local, include SEO for websites, and avoid live effects.
subprompts.status: Summarize progress, changed files, blockers, and next action without overstating completion.
subprompts.file_feedback: Apply owner feedback attached to a specific file or artifact. Preserve intent and explain changes.
subprompts.scope_decision: Stop and ask the owner when a consequential product, architecture, security, cost, deployment, capability, or public-action decision appears.
subprompts.fix_from_qa: Repair issues from QA results using failing checks, owner feedback, and source manifest.
subprompts.gate_handoff: Produce executor manifest, source manifest, engineering summary, and QA handoff.

qa.owner_visible_goal: Prove the generated app and WEAVE journey work for the relevant surface.

subprompts.start: Present a QA plan adapted to website, backend/API, CLI/TUI, or mixed surface before running checks.
subprompts.revise_plan: Update QA plan from owner feedback or changed engineering scope.
subprompts.run: Execute authorized local QA, capture evidence, classify failures, and produce claims/non-claims.
subprompts.analyze_failure: Classify failure as product/code, QA method, environment, or expectation mismatch. Route honestly.
subprompts.feedback_to_engineering: Convert QA failure and owner feedback into precise engineering repair instructions.
subprompts.rerun: Rerun QA after fixes or QA-plan changes and compare against previous failure.
subprompts.gate_handoff: Create accepted QA proof and deployment handoff only when QA is owner-accepted.

deployment.owner_visible_goal: Plan deployment after QA while stopping before credentials and live mutation.

subprompts.start: Explain provider, domain, staging, production, and capability needs after QA.
subprompts.collect_preferences: Record provider, region, domain, staging, and production preferences without raw secrets.
subprompts.plan: Create deployment setup plan and capability requirements with external effect classifications.
subprompts.blocked_credentials: Explain blocked state when credentials or grants are absent and provide safe next choices.
subprompts.gate_handoff: Create KPI handoff with deployment posture and measurement boundary.

kpi.owner_visible_goal: Choose starter KPIs and measurement boundaries.

subprompts.start: Propose three to five starter KPIs from current app truth and launch posture.
subprompts.revise: Edit KPI definitions from owner feedback and explain the tradeoff.
subprompts.instrumentation_plan: Define local, staging, and production instrumentation boundaries without assuming analytics access.
subprompts.gate_handoff: Create marketing handoff with measurable goals and blocked analytics notes.

marketing.owner_visible_goal: Plan organic and paid growth while blocking public sends and spend until approved.

subprompts.start: Ask budget and allowed channels. Make organic vs paid boundaries visible.
subprompts.plan: Create organic and paid-channel plans. Keep paid work gated and public sends blocked.
subprompts.revise: Update marketing plan from owner feedback and preserve channel assumptions.
subprompts.create_jobs: Create gated recurring job artifacts for engagement drafts, channel monitoring, and owner review.
subprompts.block_public_send: Stop before posts, messages, ads, comments, emails, or spend. Explain required grant.
subprompts.gate_handoff: Create iteration handoff with feedback sources and marketing job state.

iteration.owner_visible_goal: Turn feedback and signals into approved iteration issues.

subprompts.start: Aggregate feedback, QA findings, KPI signals, marketing signals, and owner comments.
subprompts.propose_issue: Convert signals into proposed iteration items with impact, evidence, and owner decision options.
subprompts.owner_review: Ask owner to approve, reject, or refine proposed issue.
subprompts.route_to_engineering: Create engineering packet for approved issue and require QA after implementation.
subprompts.review_stage_result: Review staged engineering and QA result before accepting the iteration.
subprompts.gate_handoff: Create analysis handoff with accepted changes and remaining signals.

analysis.owner_visible_goal: Plan or run read-only analysis for feedback, KPIs, competitors, sentiment, and improvements.

subprompts.start: Propose cadence and sources for recurring analysis.
subprompts.plan: Create an analysis heartbeat plan for feedback, KPI trends, competitor scan, sentiment, and improvement candidates.
subprompts.revise: Update cadence, sources, or output format from owner feedback.
subprompts.run_manual: Run only authorized local/read-only analysis and label source limitations.
subprompts.gate_handoff: Update world model and completion matrix with analysis posture.

completion.owner_visible_goal: Decide whether WEAVE v1 is actually complete from evidence.

subprompts.audit: Compare evidence against the WEAVE v1 completion matrix. Do not treat plans, PRs, or partial tests as completion.
subprompts.reject_gap: Keep the goal open when evidence is missing. List exact gap, owner impact, and next proof action.
subprompts.accept: Create completion summary only when code, tests, dogfood, captures, executor proof, QA proof, and owner acceptance agree.
